modelVersion.description: Version date for the static preview content model.

id.description: Stable content id for the resource.

audiences.description: Audience landing views that surface this resource. Closed set. A resource with no audiences tag is treated as recruiting-visible by default.

reviewPolicy.note: Every entry requires recorded product-owner (or, in production, editor/administrator) sign-off before publication, per backbone principle 3. See bold-docs/features/0003-three-audience-experience/resource-candidates.md for this feature's approval record.

productionMapping.note: Static preview content only. In the future .NET API / SQLite model, each resource maps to a reviewed, editor-approved Resource entity with a many-to-many relation to an Audience lookup table carrying the same alumni/active/recruiting values.
